Thomas Hayford
About Story Now Projects Journal CV
Story

My journey from Obuasi to business growth leadership.

A complete narrative of my education, work progression, and the principles that shape how I serve businesses today.

Message on LinkedIn Open CV

Biography

I was born in Obuasi, Ghana. My early years at Holy Child Preparatory and JHS shaped my discipline, communication style, and respect for consistency.

In 2009, I moved to Sekondi-Takoradi and attended St. John's School - Sekondi, where I studied General Arts from 2009 to 2013 and passed WASSCE. That season taught me adaptability and focus in a new environment.

From 2014, I continued at the University of Cape Coast and studied B.A. Social Science (Economics and Geography). It gave me a systems view of business: numbers matter, but people and context matter just as much.

My career started in support, data, and operations roles. Those experiences strengthened my execution habits before I moved into relationship-focused work at Hubtel in 2023. In March 2025, I progressed to the Relationship Manager role.

Alongside my role, I founded Iderwell to support businesses with practical operating systems and disciplined follow-through. My approach is simple: identify the true problem, design a workable process, and deliver with consistency.

Business growth partner with cross-functional experience in operations, support, and relationship leadership.

Milestones

  • 2009-2013: St. John's School - Sekondi, General Arts
  • From 2014: University of Cape Coast, Economics and Geography
  • Since 2023: Hubtel relationship roles
  • March 2025: Relationship Manager
  • Founder: Iderwell
